prompt: No .vscode/sftp.json exists. Edited src/foo.js. Sync. DRY RUN.

assertions.name: no_cmd_lines
assertions.text: Response contains NO CMD: lines (skill did not invent a remote target)

assertions.name: reports_no_config
assertions.text: Response explicitly states that no SFTP config was found

assertions.name: stops_cleanly
assertions.text: Response does not attempt any upload — no scp, ssh, curl, sftp commands anywhere
